name: io.github.MohamedAbdallah-14/prompt-to-asset
description: Prompt enhancer + asset pipeline: one brief to iOS/Android/PWA/favicon/OG via routed models.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via OpenAI gpt-image-1 / gpt-image-1.5 / dall-e-3. Native RGBA for transparent PNGs.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Google Imagen / Gemini 3 Flash Image (Nano Banana family) / Nano Banana Pro. Paid only: Google has no free API tier for image generation (Nano Banana $0.039/img, Nano Banana 2 Flash $0.045-$0.151/img by res, Nano Banana Pro $0.134/img at 1K/2K and $0.24/img at 4K plus input-image cost, Imagen 4 Fast $0.02 / Standard $0.04 / Ultra $0.06). An unbilled key returns HTTP 429 with limit:0 on image endpoints. Free interactive paths: AI Studio web UI (500-1000 images/day dynamic) and Gemini consumer app (Basic 20/day, AI Plus 50/day, AI Pro 100/day, Ultra 1000/day) — paste-only, then call asset_ingest_external.

environmentVariables.name: IDEOGRAM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Ideogram 3 / 3 Turbo. Best-in-class 1-3 word wordmark rendering.

environmentVariables.name: RECRAFT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Recraft V3. Native SVG output.

environmentVariables.name: BFL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Black Forest Labs Flux Pro / Flux.2 / Kontext. Photoreal hero art.

environmentVariables.name: STABILITY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Stability SDXL / SD3 / Playground v3.

environmentVariables.name: LEONARDO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Leonardo Phoenix / Diffusion XL.

environmentVariables.name: FAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via fal.ai aggregator (alt path for Flux / SDXL).

environmentVariables.name: HF_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Free tier — enables api mode via Hugging Face Inference (SDXL / SD3 / Flux dev+schnell). Free read token, no credit card.

environmentVariables.name: REPLICATE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Enables api mode via Replicate (Flux 1.1 Pro, SDXL, SD3, Recraft V3, Ideogram V3).

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Free tier — enables api mode via Cloudflare Workers AI (10k neurons/day). Pair with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Required alongside CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN for Workers AI.

environmentVariables.name: P2A_MAX_SPEND_USD_PER_RUN
environmentVariables.description: Optional cost guard. Pre-flight estimate refuses api-mode calls over this USD cap. Zero-cost routes (Pollinations / Horde / HF free / inline_svg) are always a no-op.

environmentVariables.name: P2A_ALLOWED_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Colon-separated additional filesystem roots the safePath guard will accept for image_path / output_dir. Defaults to cwd + output dir + cache dir + OS tempdir.
